description.value: BitBar is a Swiss-engineered physical seed backup device for securely storing cryptocurrency recovery phrases. Its hexagonal steel bar uses pre-engraved letter tiles compatible with BIP39 wallets including Ledger, Trezor and MetaMask, and supports 12 or 24-word seed phrases. The products are designed to be fireproof, waterproof and shockproof, and the company also offers backup cards and hardware-wallet bundles.
